---
title: "Theresa Lipsky"
categories: "M. Pfau" 
image: lipsky_theresa.webp
about:
  template: trestles
---

Theresa Lipsky, MD is an ophthalmology resident at the University Hospital Basel currently completing a dedicated research year. Her work focuses on developing and validating novel methods for dark adaptometry to improve assessment of retinal function.

## Education

Paracelsus Medical University Salzburg | Salzburg, Austria
Medicine | 2019 - 2024
